reference: I had a ten millimeter stone that was lodged just above the bladder removed with a laser lithotripsy done on Wednesday. Last night and today I am having swelling of my legs and feet, plus low abdominal pain. There was also a stent placed during the procedure, and that is scheduled to be removed in one week.
text: I had a 10 millimeter stone that was lodged just above the bladder removed with a laser lithotripsy done on Wednesday. Last night and today, I am having swelling of my legs and feet, plus low abdominal pain. There was also a stent placed during the procedure, and that is scheduled to be removed in one.
